title: Using monday.com for real estate?
excerpt:
If you are, you already know how great it is for keeping everything on track. But if you’re not using Purple Plum’s real estate solution, you’re missing out! 
Join us on Thursday, Sept 12, at 11:00 for a quick preview of…

posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are, you already know how great it is for keeping everything on track. But if you’re not using Purple Plum’s real estate solution, you’re missing out!

Join us on Thursday, Sept 12, at 11:00 for a quick preview of our latest solution. In just an hour, we’ll cover:

  • Why monday CRM rocks: We’ve built on it to link all your emails and activities directly to your boards. No more hunting for info!

Success story: Riley Smith Group will share how they’ve totally streamlined their brokerage using our solution.

Transaction Management Features: From lead to close, our solution automates the entire process, making it a breeze for brokerages handling multiple transactions across agents. No more worrying about things slipping through the cracks!

  • Property Management Features: Whether it’s rental schedules, maintenance tracking, or lease turnovers, our features ensure you manage every aspect of property rentals smoothly and efficiently.
  • Special offer: Exclusive discounts for webinar attendees ready to level up their boards.

You already know monday.com is a game-changer. Now, see how Purple Plum’s real estate solution can provide you with the jump start you need and enable you to visualize how monday.com can be harnessed to digitize large real estate-focused organizations. Register here.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
It is always great to hear about different solutions. Real estate has a lot of use cases! Can you fill out this form with the link to the webinar and I can add it to our community calendar?

forms.monday.com

Add a community event to our calendar | WorkForms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

posts.author: Nataliaru (Natalia)
posts.cookedHtml: Can’t wait to learn more about this solution!

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: We’ve been building in a lot of great features to this solution, can’t wait to share it with everyone!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Added this to the calendar! If there is a recording add it here!

posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml: Will do! But for anyone who sees this in time, only participants who attend the webinar are eligable for the discount we are providing ! Register in the link above.

posts.cookedHtml: Here is the link to the webinar on YouTube

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: Check out Purple Plum’s real estate solution for monday.com to streamline your brokerage and property management processes. Join the webinar on Sept 12 for exclusive insights and discounts.

posts.author: mattewwade06 (Mattew wade)
posts.cookedHtml: Using monday.com for real estate is such a smart way to streamline workflows and keep everything from leads to leases organized, and it’s great to see how others are applying it in practice. I also came across another helpful discussion on the community about using monday CRM to manage real estate deals, covering acquisitions, dispositions, and more, which you can check out here: https://community.monday.com/t/ever-used-monday-crm-to-manage-real-estate-deals-here-s-how-it-can-handle-acquisitions-dispositions-and-everything-in-between/112963property management definitely worth a look for more ideas and best practices.
